'''Arapia''' was the [[Kadri'Ra]] adoptive [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].<ref name="AE" /> It was located in the [[Arapia system/Legends|Arapia system]].

During the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Arapia had more than one hundred million Kadri'Ra individuals. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] decided that Kadri'Ra were not [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] and, due to their [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] and other measures, reduced the number to 14,000 individuals as of [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="AE" />

Crime in Arapia was controlled by the Kadri'Ra crimelord [[Saadoon-Kauldi]], originally a native of Arapia who left the system after one assassination attempt.<ref name="BSS" /> Later, circa [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]], Saadoon-Kauldi sent some minions to Arapia to met [[Saylor Marjan|Saylor "Marji" Marjan]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] inhabitant who owed him some money.<ref name="ABW">{{JournalCite|5|A Bitter Winter}}</ref>
